name: Hot & Hearty Heroes
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Thinly sliced deli Swiss cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, cook onion and green pepper in the salad dressing just until tender.
2. Stir in mustard; remove from heat. Set aside.
3. Grease a cookie sheet. In a large bowl combine flour mixture with yeast from the foil packet. Stir in hot water, 2 tablespoons olive oil, and egg until the dough pulls away from the sides of the bowl.
4. Turn the dough out onto a floured surface. With greased or floured hands, shape the dough into a ball. Knead the dough for 5 minutes until smooth.
5. Sprinkle additional flour over the surface to reduce stickiness. Cover with a large bowl; let rest 5 minutes.
6. On a lightly floured surface, roll the dough to a 16x14-inch rectangle.
7. Arrange ham, salami, and Swiss cheese lengthwise over half of the dough, overlapping slices; sprinkle with cheddar cheese.
8. Spread onion mixture over meats and cheeses. Fold the remaining half of the dough over the filling. Pinch the edges to seal; tuck the ends under.
9. Place on greased cookie sheet. Cover loosely with greased plastic wrap and a cloth towel. Let rise in a warm place (80-85F) 15 minutes.
10. Preheat oven to 400F. Uncover the dough. Brush with 2 tablespoons olive oil; sprinkle with poppy seed.
11. Bake at 400F for 15 to 20 minutes or until golden brown. Let stand 15 to 30 minutes before serving.
12. Cut into half lengthwise, then make 10 crosswise cuts forming 20 slices.
